case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS FERNANDO LEDEZMA ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $565.38 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, LUIS FERNANDO LEDEZMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, LUIS FERNANDO LEDEZMA $472.00 PRINCIPAL, $6,887.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,444.00, $458.93 IN PRINCIPAL BALANCE AND $14.00 LATE FEE WITH CONTRACT INTEREST ON THE PRINCIPAL BALANCE FROM 05/17/2018. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $83.00 - SERVED AUG-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, LUIS FERNANDO LEDEZMA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS FERNANDO LEDEZMA ESPINOZA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
